# Mage Levels

**Key Stats:** INT, WIS
**Hit Die:** 1d6
**Starting HP:** 10
**Saves:** INT+, STR-

---

# Levels

### Level 1
**Cantrip Mastery.** You learn three cantrips of your choice.

### Level 2
**Arcane Recovery.** Once per long rest, regain one spell slot.

> [!faq]- Can I burn a slot to power a non-spell ability?
> Ask your GM. The default answer is no.
